payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current applicable memory for Sam in the Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so it should not be surfaced as a current fact.
payload.decision: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the recall context. mem_old was filtered because it has been marked superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt provides insufficient evidence to resolve Sam or Goldman to durable entity IDs beyond the recall/debug context.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug behavior for Sam-related memories involving Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because mem_new is the active/current memory, while mem_old was excluded due to being superseded.

details: Explained that mem_new is current and returned.
Explained that mem_old is superseded and therefore filtered.
Did not present the superseded mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, add disambiguating entity metadata before committing or recalling durable facts.
